sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92816" key="r(uparome/las" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῠπᾰρο-μέλᾱς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">αινα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">αν</itype>, <sense id="n92816.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a dirty black</tr_>, ib.d.</sense> </entryFree>
